<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[co:commons:Category:Tsukubusuma-jinja]][[en:Tsukubusuma Shrine]][[fr:Sanctuaire Tsukubusuma]][[ja:都久夫須麻神社]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[co:commons:Category:Tsukubusuma-jinja]][[en:Tsukubusuma Shrine]][[fr:Sanctuaire Tsukubusuma]][[ja:都久夫須麻神社]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[en:Tsukubusuma Shrine]][[fr:Sanctuaire Tsukubusuma]][[ja:都久夫須麻神社]]


{{Expand language|topic=|langcode=ja|otherarticle=都久夫須麻神社|date=December 2021}}

{{Infobox religious building
| name = Tsukubusuma Shrine
| image = File:Tsukubusuma Shrine.jpg
| caption = Main shrine of Tsukubusuma Shrine, designated as a {{ill|National Treasure (Japan)|en|National Treasure (Japan)|WD=Q1139795|lt=National Treasure|1=National Treasure (Japan)}}.
| map_type = Japan
| map_alt = 
| coordinates = {{Coord|35.42063888888889|N|136.14422222222223|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}}
| map_relief  = 
| map_size = 
| map_caption = 
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
| type = 
| deity ={{ill|Ichikishimahime|WD=Q11059454|1=Ichikishima-hime}}; {{ill|Ugajin|WD=Q795080|1=Ugajin}} 
| founded_by = 
| established = 
| date_destroyed = 
| location = 
| website = 
| architecture_style ={{ill|East Asian hip-and-gable roof|WD=Q855025|1=East Asian hip-and-gable roof}} 
| festival = 
| leadership = 
| location = {{ill|Nagahama|WD=Q844130|1=Nagahama, Shiga}}
}}
'''Tsukubusuma Shrine''' (都久夫須麻神社, ''Tsukubusuma Jinja'') is a [[Shinto]] shrine on {{ill|Chikubu Island|en|Chikubu Island|WD=Q2975401|lt=Chikubu Island|1=Chikubu Island}} in {{ill|Shiga Prefecture|en|Shiga Prefecture|WD=Q131358|lt=Shiga Prefecture|1=Shiga Prefecture}}, Japan. Its {{nihongo|main hall|本殿|honden}} is a {{ill|National Treasure (Japan)|en|National Treasure (Japan)|WD=Q1139795|lt=National Treasure of Japan|1=National Treasure (Japan)}}. The shrine's main festival is held annually on June 15. It is also called '''Chikubushima Shrine''' (竹生島神社, ''Chikubushima Jinja'').

==See also==
* {{ill|List of National Treasures of Japan (shrines)|en|List of National Treasures of Japan (shrines)|WD=Q3245520|lt=List of National Treasures of Japan (shrines)|1=List of National Treasures of Japan (shrines)}}

==References==
*Joseph Cali with John Dougill, ''Shinto Shrines: A Guide to the Sacred Sites of Japan's Ancient Religion'' (University of Hawai'i Press, 2013).

<!--this was an inappropriate and erroneous transclusion meant to be a bottom bar thing I think but not including-->
{{Authority control}}
‎]]
{{Munakata Faith}}{{Shinto-stub}}

{{translated page|ja|都久夫須麻神社|version=103659952|comment=Imported full ja history}}



[[ceb:Tsukubusuma Shrine]]

[[en:Tsukubusuma Shrine]]

[[fr:Sanctuaire Tsukubusuma]]


[[en:Tsukubusuma Shrine]]<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
{{Commons category|Tsukubusuma-jinja}}
[[ja:都久夫須麻神社]]
<!--enwiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
{{Commons category|Tsukubusuma-jinja}}
[[ja:都久夫須麻神社]]


{{wikidata link|Q11643470}}
[[Category:710 establishments]]
[[Category:8th-century establishments in Japan]]
[[Category:8th-century Shinto shrines]]
[[Category:Architecture of Azuchi-Momoyama period]]
[[Category:Buildings and structures in Nagahama, Shiga]]
[[Category:Former Prefectural Shrines in Shiga Prefecture]]
[[Category:History of Nagahama, Shiga]]
[[Category:Municipal Tangible Cultural Properties in Shiga Prefecture]]
[[Category:National Treasures of Japan (Buildings)]]
[[Category:National Treasures of Shiga Prefecture]]
[[Category:Religious buildings and structures completed in the 710s]]
[[Category:Relocated buildings and structures]]
[[Category:Shikinaisha in Ōmi Province]]
[[Category:Shinto shrines in Shiga Prefecture]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]]
[[Category:Kokuhei-sha]]
